example.value: Bah Meran mong nik urag kenon. Ilei de sulog imuh Wak Sali. Ilei de kedua imuh Bah Gan. Ilei de iluj imuh Wak Manja.

translation.value: Bah Meran mempunyai tiga orang anak. Anaknya yang sulung, namanya Wak Sali. Anaknya yang kedua, namanya Bah Gan. Anaknya yang bongsu, namanya Wak Manja.
Bah Meran has three children. The oldest is Wak Sali. The second is Bah Gan. The youngest is Wak Manja.

example.value: Hamapen ilei ya derjah 3 tapi Bah Nua lekat pek kipanei beije, apetahlagi bebaca.

example.value: Bah Jali kigemar bela binatag. Kek mong kibela nar ikor cok, 5 ikor kuceg, 15 ikor chep merbok ru jeoi kak ku ikulam.

translation.value: Bah Jali gemar membela binatang. Dia ada membela dua ekor anjing, 5 ekor kucing, 15 ekor burung merbuk dan terdapat banyak ikan di kolamnya.
Bah Jali likes to raise animals. He has two dogs, 5 cats, 15 birds and there are many fish in his pond.

example.value: "Sarak ilei pek eng canpor hal kek," Bah Mali kiberlag bile bitanya kisetujuka tok imenang kaha-jekjeg.

translation.value: "Terserah kepada dia sendiri, saya tidak mencampuri urusan beliau," Bah Mali menjawap apabila ditanya adakah dia bersetuju jika adiknya mahu mendirikan rumah tangga.
"It's up to her herself, I don't interfere in her business," Bah Mali replied when asked if he would agree if his sister wanted to get married.

example.value: "Agok pej insang kak ajeh medei buleh hicak," Bah Ket kipasal nu eng.

translation.value: "Jangan buang insang ikan tersebut kerana ianya boleh dimakan," Bah Ket berkata kepada saya.
"Don't throw away the fish's gills because they can be eaten," Bah Ket told me.

definitionorgloss.value: mengintai; lihat dengan bersembunyi-sembunyi untuk mengetahui gerak-geri sesuatu
to lurk; to peep; to pry; to spy on

example.value: Bah Jol kiintei ha ikenon litau tengah kinyok rukok ku belakang deg pog.

translation.value: Bah Jol mengintai anak terunanya yang sedang merokok di belakang reban ayam.
Bah Jol spied on his son who was smoking a cigarette behind a chicken coop.

example-2.value: Bah Long kiet berintei ru Bah Bom.

translation-2.value: Bah Long pergi memburu dengan Bah Bom.
Bah Long went hunting with Bah Bom.

example-2.value: Bah Jaman ru ikekawat naiet nu serag naiha-berintei.

translation-2.value: Bah Jaman dan rakan-rakannya pergi ke hutan untuk memburu.
Bah Jaman and his friends went to the forest to hunt by stalking.

Bah Jol mengintai anak terunanya yang sedang merokok di belakang reban ayam.
Bah Long pergi memburu dengan Bah Bom.
Bah Jaman dan rakan-rakannya pergi ke hutan untuk memburu.
en: to lurk; to peep; to pry; to spy on
Bah Jol spied on his son who was smoking a cigarette behind a chicken coop.
to hunt by stalking
Bah Long went hunting with Bah Bom.
Bah Jaman and his friends went to the forest to hunt by stalking.

definitionorgloss.value: merasa lemas atau sesak tidak dapat bernafas

example.value: Ngrasa ngip ku kateh deg dewan ajeh ha bilir jengoi sengoi.

translation.value: Saya merasa lemas tidak dapat bernafas di dalam dewan tersebut kerana terlalu ramai orang.
I felt I could suffocate in the hall because there were too many people.

example-2.value: Kak de birag ya Bah Anis ajeh ingoi cengim.

translation-2.value: Ikan yang dibakar oleh Bah Anis itu berbau asap.
The fish which had been grilled by Bah Anis smelled of smoke.

example-2.value: Wak Mala ru ikekenon naigei ku luar deg medei nairasa cengip mase mai ju Kementerian Kesihatan naipam cas penglai kemet ku kawasan deg enai.

translation-2.value: Wak Mala dan anak-anaknya duduk diluar rumah kerana merasa lemas akibat asap semasa orang-orang dari Kementerian Kesihatan mengepam asap semburan ubat nyamuk di kawasan rumah mereka.
Wak Mala and her children sat outside the house because they felt suffocated by the smoke when the worker from the Ministry of Health was spraying mosquito repellent in their housing area.

definitionorgloss.value: Islam; ajaran agama yang disampaikan oleh Nabi Muhammad SAW

example.value: Ku kampug eng mong mai de Kristian, mai de Islam ru mai de lekat pecaya manah.

example.value: "Jik mong jeoi jibela itek untuk ha jijual ipengleg," Wak Bem kipasal nu eng.

translation.value: "Kami ada membela banyak itik bagi menjual telurnya," Wak Bem memberitahu kepada saya.
"We have been raising a lot of ducks to sell their eggs," Wak Bem told me.

example.value: "'Iyeu, iyeu,' kuceg eng kijap kisemanj caknak," Bah Man kiurok.

translation.value: "'Miau, miau,' kucing saya menangis meminta makanan," Bah Man berkata.
